title: Adjusted Present Value Approach: Calculate the present value of 20000 expected in 3 years,...
summary: Apply or evaluate the Adjusted Present Value approach for firm valuation.
prompt: Calculate the present value of $20,000 expected in 3 years, if the discount rate is 5%.
solution: PV = CF / (1 + r)^n = $20,000 / (1 + 0.05)^3 = $20,000 / 1.157625 = $17,014. This calculation demonstrates the time value of money, reflecting the present worth of future cash flows.
